normative_statement: Every material capability shall contribute to a professional outcome rather than optimize artifact production as an end in itself.
Every material representation, decision, action, and PWU shall remain traceable to originating intent or an explicitly authorized exploratory purpose.
The platform shall support professional reasoning, not merely information storage, task execution, or artifact management.
verification_method: UX review; scenario test; semantic model audit

normative_statement: Claims, confidence, assumptions, alternatives, and supporting or contradicting evidence shall remain explicit and inspectable.
Professional reasoning shall remain reconstructable across time, participants, and revisions.
Professional representations shall be persistent, computable, observable, versioned, composable, and reconcilable.
Professional reasoning shall be recursively composable without violating reconstructability.
Organizational coherence shall be maintained through continuous reconciliation rather than episodic repair alone.
Organizational memory shall preserve reasoning and rationale rather than only artifacts.
AI participants shall remain subject to traceability, observability, evidence, validation, accountability, and reconciliation obligations.
Professional cognition and computational execution shall both be observable.
verification_method: OpenTelemetry contract tests; cognitive metric review

normative_statement: Lower-level profiles and implementations shall specialize but shall not contradict higher-authority semantic documents.
verification_method: Document dependency review; model diff policy

normative_statement: Conflicts among code, documentation, and observed behavior shall be classified and reconciled; neither code nor documentation shall be assumed correct by default.
verification_method: Baseline discrepancy register and disposition review

normative_statement: Dates, staffing, estimates, and sprint assignments shall be maintained in a mutable operating plan and shall not redefine normative capability gates.
Every canonical entity shall possess a stable globally unique identity that survives renaming, revision, and reassignment.
Every entity shall declare a canonical entity type; domain subtypes shall preserve base semantics.
Mutable entities shall be versioned and historical versions shall remain reconstructable where required.
Material entities and relationships shall record provenance, including human, AI, imported, derived, observed, and reconciled origin.
Lifecycle state, validity state, and relevant temporal context shall be explicit and shall not be inferred from null or missing values.
AI participants shall be represented explicitly and AI-originated cognition shall not be attributed to humans.
Questions and uncertainties shall be first-class entities and shall drive professional work and decision readiness.
Every representation shall declare what it represents and its professional purpose.
Critical assumptions shall be explicit and linked to dependent reasoning, decisions, and work.
Mandatory constraints shall be evaluated before conflicting decisions or actions become effective unless an authorized exception exists.
Claims shall remain distinct from evidence, and evidentiary support shall be represented by explicit typed relationships.
Confidence shall remain distinct from approval, priority, completion, certainty, and severity, and shall identify its basis.
Every completed reasoning activity shall identify outputs or explicitly record that no valid conclusion was produced.
Materially considered alternatives that are rejected should retain rejection rationale.
A decision shall be represented as an authorized commitment under available knowledge and shall not be treated as truth.
verification_method: Semantic distinction test; UI acceptance test

normative_statement: An action shall remain distinct from the decision authorizing it and from the outcome it is intended to affect.
Observation, interpretation, and derived claim shall remain distinguishable; an observation becomes evidence only through explicit use.
Artifacts shall remain semantically distinct from the representations they embody.
Dependencies shall be explicit, typed, directional, and status-bearing.
Validations shall be explicit entities with criteria, result, performer, and time.
Reconciliation shall preserve the prior state and the rationale for change.
Narrative memory shall identify its source entities and shall not silently invent missing rationale.
Material semantic relationships and contradictions shall be first-class, versionable, provenance-bearing objects or typed relationships.
Transaction time, valid time, observation time, and decision effective time shall remain distinct where applicable.
Every material semantic transition shall emit a domain event with causation, correlation, provenance, and version context.
The implementation shall preserve the canonical semantic boundary distinctions enumerated by CPCO, including Outcome ≠ Artifact, Claim ≠ Evidence, Decision ≠ Truth, and PWU ≠ Task.
Each PWU shall possess exactly one active professionally meaningful objective.
Each non-exploratory PWU shall trace to at least one active intent.
PWU scope, exclusions, and non-goals shall be explicit; material scope changes shall be versioned and impact-assessed.
PWUs shall maintain lifecycle state and cognitive state as separate explicit dimensions.
Material PWU lifecycle transitions shall be explicit, validated, authorized, evented, and rejected atomically when preconditions fail.
A PWU shall satisfy the framing contract before it may become ready or active.
PWU participation shall be role-based, explicit, and capable of distinguishing ownership, coordination, review, validation, approval, and execution.
External and imported inputs shall be treated as untrusted until parsed, normalized, validated, and accepted for use.
Required outputs shall define semantic purpose, acceptance criteria, validation, authoritative status, and downstream consumers.
Questions and uncertainties shall be modeled explicitly, including residual uncertainty accepted at completion.
Critical assumptions and mandatory constraints shall be visible and evaluated at framing, decision, action authorization, completion, and reconciliation as applicable.
Reasoning activities shall record purpose, method, inputs, outputs, participant, assumptions introduced, limitations, and provenance.
Claim, evidence, and confidence changes shall be explicit and confidence changes should preserve their basis and triggering evidence.
source_clause: Section 19 — Claim, Evidence, and Confidence Model

normative_statement: Material decisions shall identify authority, alternatives, evidence, assumptions, constraints, rationale, and residual uncertainty.
Action completion shall remain distinct from PWU completion and outcome achievement.
Material observation variance shall trigger reconciliation when it conflicts with current claims, assumptions, representations, decisions, outcomes, or constraints.
Dependencies shall be explicit, typed, bidirectionally visible across PWUs, and capable of blocking advancement.
Required validations shall be planned, criteria-bearing, authority-aware, and shall not treat inconclusive as pass.
Reconciliation shall identify triggers, affected entities and PWUs, prior state, proposed state, impact, and authority.
Each child PWU shall receive a delegation contract, and decomposition shall be based on professional meaning rather than UI or arbitrary task granularity.
A parent PWU with children shall perform recomposition before completion; child completion shall not imply parent coherence.
PWU completion shall be condition-based and shall be rejected when mandatory validation, dependencies, constraints, contradictions, or recomposition remain unresolved.
Failure, retry, tactic change, and escalation shall be classified distinctly and shall preserve attempted work, evidence, uncertainty, and recommended disposition.
source_clause: Section 30 — Failure, Tactic Change, and Escalation

normative_statement: Authoritative PWU state changes shall use semantic commands and immutable events rather than unrestricted generic mutation.
Material PWU commands shall use optimistic concurrency and shall reject stale expected versions rather than silently overwrite current state.
An RPH shall frame, allocate, coordinate, monitor, validate, reconcile, synthesize, and escalate professional work while preserving intent and coherence.
An RPH shall govern coordination and shall not directly own or silently rewrite the professional knowledge contained in PWUs.
Subordinate RPHs shall possess bounded purpose, scope, authority, completion conditions, and parent traceability.
RPH planning shall be continuous, explicit, and versioned; plans shall produce or propose commands rather than mutate PWUs directly.
verification_method: Plan revision and command boundary tests

normative_statement: Allocation shall consider capability, authority, availability, risk, cost, independence, and tool access.
RPH progress assessment shall measure professional progress such as uncertainty reduction, evidence sufficiency, validation, and synthesis rather than computational activity alone.
Technical retry and professional tactic change shall remain distinct, and no-progress detection shall trigger tactic evaluation rather than blind repetition.
Escalation shall be explicit, authority-directed, and shall carry a complete professional escalation package.
RPH synthesis shall evaluate cross-child coherence and produce explicit synthesized professional entities before parent completion.
RPH coordination state, bottlenecks, tactic health, validation backlog, synthesis backlog, and escalation shall be observable.
Human judgment points, authority gaps, legal, ethical, safety, and strategic trade-offs shall remain visible and reviewable.
Recursive expansion shall be governed by depth, concurrency, cost, time, and context limits and shall never silently truncate work.
Every material projection shall be derived from authoritative semantic, PWU, RPH, lifecycle, role, authority, and purpose context.
A projection shall not independently mutate or become an authoritative semantic source of truth.
Material projections shall preserve access to provenance, confidence, uncertainty, contradiction, completeness, and filtering disclosures.
Current, historical, predicted, stale, partial, and offline states shall be explicitly distinguishable.
Available UI and agent commands shall derive from current role, authority, lifecycle, cognitive state, policy, and validation condition.
Equivalent projections across web, desktop, mobile, IDE, and conversation shall preserve semantic continuity.
Calculated indicators and synthetic scores shall be explainable and navigable to their basis.
Cross-projection navigation shall preserve professional context, temporal mode, selected entities, and originating path.
The interface shall support cognitive zoom and cognitive time without losing intent and parent context.
The application shall implement a stable cognitive workspace shell with global context, local objective, primary projection, context inspector, and professional command region.
The primary experience shall not be organized around chat, file hierarchy, task boards, or disconnected technical modules.
source_clause: Primary experience object; UI semantic invariants

normative_statement: Lifecycle, cognitive, validity, confidence, technical loading, and temporal states shall remain semantically distinct in the UI.
source_clause: UI-INV-003; Loading and Data State Model

normative_statement: Disabled or rejected commands shall explain the professional reason and required remediation.
Graphs, matrices, and complex canvases shall provide accessible structured alternatives; color shall not be the sole carrier of meaning.
Completion readiness shall expose individual professional conditions and shall not be represented solely as a generic percentage.
AI contributions shall remain visibly attributable, proposed by default, evidence-bearing, confidence-qualified, and reviewable.
Professional attention shall be durable, context-bearing, authority-aware, prioritized by consequence, and disposition-required.
Routes and screens shall be treated as addressable projections over one semantic model rather than separate domain modules.

JSDL shall be the canonical machine-readable source for entities, relationships, aggregates, lifecycles, commands, events, invariants, validators, permissions, projections, and observability metadata.
The compiler shall separate parsing, module resolution, symbol resolution, type checking, semantic validation, IR generation, and target generation.
Compilation and generation shall be deterministic, reproducible, and source-mapped.
The invariant expression language shall be constrained, deterministic, and incapable of arbitrary filesystem, network, process, or code execution.
Module imports, aliases, versions, and symbols shall resolve explicitly and ambiguities shall fail compilation rather than resolve by order.
Generators shall consume only validated canonical IR and shall not reinterpret unresolved source or introduce new professional semantics.
Generated contracts shall include stable semantic identity, module and model version, and source traceability.
source_clause: Source Mapping and Generated File Contract

normative_statement: The compiler shall classify semantic model changes for compatibility and shall detect breaking changes.
PWA extensions shall preserve canonical identity, semantics, and invariants and shall not weaken them.
Compiler diagnostics shall be stable, structured, source-located, and actionable.
A state change shall become authoritative only through the defined command handling pipeline and successful atomic commit.
source_clause: Central Execution Principle; Command Handling Pipeline

normative_statement: Authority shall be evaluated at command execution time using current principal, participant, delegation, scope, state, policy, and constraints.
Aggregate state, version increment, immutable events, command result, and idempotency record shall commit atomically.
Committed events shall be immutable and totally ordered per aggregate version; cross-aggregate order shall use causation, correlation, and process state.
Externally initiated material commands shall be idempotent, and duplicate delivery shall not duplicate semantic state transitions.
Stale commands shall not silently overwrite current state; conflicts shall return current version and a professional disposition.
Validators shall be side-effect free with respect to authoritative state and shall return explicit pass, fail, conditional, inconclusive, or not-applicable results.
Long-running human, external, timer, and evidence waits shall be represented durably and shall survive runtime restart.
AI executions shall be durable, attributable, scope- and authority-bounded, and their outputs shall be proposed by default.
External operations shall use durable records, idempotency or status inquiry, and saga or compensation semantics when atomicity is unavailable.
Retries shall distinguish transient technical failure from repeated professional reasoning, and no-progress shall trigger tactic change or escalation.
Reconciliation changes shall be applied through normal semantic commands and shall not bypass aggregate invariants.
Cross-aggregate coherence shall be maintained through commands, events, processes, validators, reconciliation, and explicit temporary incoherence rather than hidden distributed mutation.
Authoritative objects and events shall identify semantic model versions, and upgrades shall support migration, upcasting, projection rebuild, or explicit incompatibility handling.
verification_method: Model upgrade and event upcast tests

normative_statement: All authoritative and derived runtime state shall be tenant-scoped and organization boundaries shall require explicit policy.
Material state shall preserve provenance and append-only or tamper-evident audit across commands, authority, AI execution, exceptions, reconciliation, and administration.
Replay and projection rebuild shall not repeat external side effects and shall deterministically reconstruct state under the applicable model version.
Backpressure, budgets, safe stop, and recursive expansion limits shall protect authoritative processing without fabricating completion or silently truncating work.
PostgreSQL authoritative state, committed events, and the transactional outbox shall implement the single-node authoritative boundary.
Projection tables shall remain derived, checkpointed, idempotently updated, stale-aware, and rebuildable.
Process, RPH, timer, agent, external-operation, and attention state shall survive process or container restart.
Tenant isolation shall be enforced through application scoping and PostgreSQL row-level security where practical.
Sandbox execution shall isolate CPU, memory, storage, time, process count, network, filesystem, secrets, and artifacts and shall prohibit host-control access by default.
Agent and sandbox workloads shall not exhaust resources required for authoritative command processing and PostgreSQL.
Capability-specific degradation, projection staleness, queue saturation, and dependency failure shall be observable.
Recoverable backups shall exist off-host, shall include PostgreSQL, object storage, configuration, semantic sources, and secrets under separate protection, and shall be restore-tested.
The runtime shall verify at startup that deployed JSDL contracts, semantic model fingerprints, database versions, and migrations are compatible.
Administrative recovery and override actions shall be audited and shall not use direct semantic row editing as a normal operating procedure.
The single-node profile shall explicitly disclose that it does not provide host-failure high availability.
The implementation shall preserve explicit service boundaries, versioned contracts, idempotency, leases, checkpoints, and outbox semantics to support later distribution.
JanumiCode shall optimize for realized software-enabled outcomes rather than code, pull requests, builds, or deployments as ends in themselves.
Materially ambiguous product intent shall be formalized through questions, assumptions, scope, outcomes, and non-goals before unrestricted implementation begins.
Every accepted requirement shall trace to intent or authorized obligation and shall identify a verification or validation method.
Vague quality attributes shall be interpreted or made measurable rather than remain as unqualified adjectives.
User journeys shall trace to requirements, capabilities, experience representations, verification, and operational observation.
Material architecture decisions shall preserve context, alternatives, criteria, evidence, assumptions, constraints, trade-offs, consequences, and revisit triggers.
Material architecture drift shall receive explicit disposition through implementation correction, architecture revision, authorized exception, temporary incoherence, or reconciliation.
Material data and interface models shall define ownership, authority, classification, compatibility, lifecycle, security, observability, and migration obligations as applicable.
Security and privacy shall be integrated throughout product realization rather than treated only as terminal reviews.
Critical product, domain, data, security, architectural, and operational invariants shall identify specification, implementation, verification, and observation strategies.

Implementation plans shall preserve intent, requirements, architecture, invariants, dependencies, validation, rollout, rollback, and observability, and should favor professionally coherent vertical slices.

Every coding-agent execution shall receive an explicit professional contract containing objective, intent, scope, non-goals, requirements, architecture, invariants, constraints, validations, completion, and escalation conditions.

Coding agents shall not silently broaden scope, replace intent, invent approval, suppress tests, weaken constraints, change public contracts, or claim completion from compilation or code generation alone.
Repository, code, documentation, tests, and operational behavior shall be treated as evidence-bearing representations requiring reconciliation rather than any one being automatically authoritative.
Material software changes shall trace to approved scope or authorized incident action and shall preserve implementation rationale, affected representations, tests, risk, and provenance.
Verification shall trace requirements and invariants to methods, results, evidence, environments, failures, and waivers; inconclusive shall not be treated as pass.
Release readiness shall evaluate scope coherence, verification, security, migration, operations, observability, support, residual risk, and rollback readiness.
Deployment success shall remain distinct from release acceptance and outcome achievement, and production observation shall feed requirement, architecture, invariant, risk, and reconciliation state.

Production incidents shall preserve timeline, claims, evidence, decisions, containment, remediation, recovery validation, residual risk, follow-on work, and reconciliation; service restoration alone shall not close the incident.
The JanumiCode Product Realization Map shall support traceability from intent and outcome through journey, requirement, architecture, change, verification, release, observation, and reconciliation.
The JanumiCode UI shall remain PWU- and cognition-centered and shall not become chat-first, file-tree-first, task-first, or a rigid waterfall.
CI/CD and repository events shall be normalized into explicit actions, artifacts, observations, evidence, validations, and reconciliation triggers rather than treated as professional completion.
